name() - Method in class server.scheduler.ReminderJob
 
name() - Method in interface server.scheduler.SchedulerJob
Stable identifier for this job, used as the registry key and the handle the server console passes to SchedulerService.runNow(String).

navBox - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Sidebar container the nav buttons are added to.
navButtons - Variable in class client.app.Navigator
Sidebar buttons by screen id.
navigator - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Navigator for the quick-link buttons.
Navigator - Class in client.app
Owns the content area inside MainShell and the map of registered screens.
Navigator(StackPane, NetworkService, Session, Consumer<Navigator.Screen>) - Constructor for class client.app.Navigator
Creates a navigator bound to the shell's content area.
Navigator.Screen - Record Class in client.app
Describes one navigable screen.
NavItem(Navigator.Screen, Predicate<Session>) - Constructor for record class client.view.MainShellController.NavItem
Creates an instance of a NavItem record class.
navItems() - Method in class client.view.MainShellController
The full catalogue of shell screens with their visibility rules.
network - Variable in class client.app.Navigator
Network service injected into controllers that request it.
network - Variable in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
The shared network service, bound to GoNatureClientApp.session.
network - Variable in class client.view.BaseController
Shared NetworkService used for SUBSCRIBE / UNSUBSCRIBE wire traffic.
network - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Shared network service for the dashboard's metric calls.
network - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Shared network service for shell-level calls (logout, notifications).
network - Variable in class client.view.UserLoginController
Shared network service for probe + login calls.
NetworkService - Class in client.service
Thin async wrapper around ClientConnection.
NetworkService(Session) - Constructor for class client.service.NetworkService
Creates a network service bound to a client session.
NetworkService.ConnectionListener - Interface in client.service
Notified after every completed call so the UI can reflect socket reachability.
NetworkService.ProbeResult - Class in client.service
Result bundle for NetworkService.probe(String, int).
newPriceCents - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
The reservation's recomputed price after the edit, in cents.
newValue - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
The requested new value.
newValueField - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
New value input.
nextVisitCard(ReservationDTO, LocalDate, Map<Integer, String>) - Method in class client.view.DashboardController
Builds the "next visit" card, or an empty-state card when there is none.
NO_SHOW - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ReservationStatus
The visitor never showed up for a confirmed slot.
noShow - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportRow
Reservations marked no-show (ReservationStatus.NO_SHOW) that day.
NoShowJob - Class in server.scheduler
Marks past CONFIRMED reservations that nobody ever entered the park for as ReservationStatus.NO_SHOW.
NoShowJob(Consumer<String>) - Constructor for class server.scheduler.NoShowJob
Creates the job with a sink for its one-line run summaries.
NotificationCenterController - Class in client.view
Notification center, reachable from the sidebar by any logged-in actor.
NotificationCenterController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.NotificationCenterController
Creates the notification-center controller.
NotificationController - Class in server.control
Owns the notification domain: listing the logged-in actor's messages and acknowledging them.
NotificationController() - Constructor for class server.control.NotificationController
Creates the notification controller.
NotificationDAO - Class in server.dao
Data access object for the notification table.
NotificationDAO() - Constructor for class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Creates the notification DAO.
NotificationDTO - Class in common.dto
Immutable data transfer object representing a notification row — a simulated/popup message addressed to exactly one recipient (a visitor or a staff user).
NotificationDTO(int, Long, Integer, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Creates a fully populated notification.
notifications - Variable in class server.scheduler.NoShowJob
Stateless notification helper, used for the courtesy no-show notice.
notifications - Variable in class server.scheduler.ReminderJob
Stateless notification helper, used to deliver the reminder.
notificationService - Variable in class server.control.ParkController
Stateless notification helper, shared across all client threads.
notificationService - Variable in class server.control.ReservationController
Stateless notification helper, shared across all client threads.
NotificationService - Class in server.control
Small stateless helper that other controllers call to send a notification to a single recipient (a visitor or a staff user).
NotificationService() - Constructor for class server.control.NotificationService
Creates the notification service.
notifKey - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
The key MainShellController.notifSub is registered against, retained so logout can UNSUBSCRIBE it.
notifSub - Variable in class client.view.MainShellController
Local handle for the logged-in actor's notification subscription, dropped on logout.
